name: zeffect_anim_init
description: zEffect_Anim::Init resets animation globals, seeds random-unit state, and registers animation ZAR handlers when enabled.
known_limits: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 COFF byte compare currently fails for zEffect_Anim::Init: 144 unmasked mismatches after masking 120 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 253 bytes and the VC object body is 288 bytes with 13 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.
The native smoke verifies previous-runtime shutdown, animation global reset, gravity/random-unit initialization, and optional ZAR handler registration.
